message:
fix: Use --branch v3.14.2 in CPython sparse checkout

The previous approach failed because --depth 1 doesn't fetch tags.
Using --branch v3.14.2 clones directly at the tag without needing
a separate git checkout command.

Fixes error: pathspec 'v3.14.2' did not match any file(s) known to git

files.patch:
@@ -446,9 +446,8 @@ jobs:
 
       - name: Checkout CPython test infrastructure
         run: |
-          git clone --depth 1 --filter=blob:none --sparse https://github.com/python/cpython.git /tmp/cpython
+          git clone --depth 1 --filter=blob:none --sparse --branch v3.14.2 https://github.com/python/cpython.git /tmp/cpython
           cd /tmp/cpython
-          git checkout v3.14.2
           git sparse-checkout set Lib/test
 
       - name: Run CPython tests (core1)
@@ -495,9 +494,8 @@ jobs:

-          git clone --depth 1 --filter=blob:none --sparse https://github.com/python/cpython.git /tmp/cpython

       - name: Run CPython tests (core2)

-          git clone --depth 1 --filter=blob:none --sparse https://github.com/python/cpython.git C:\cpython
+          git clone --depth 1 --filter=blob:none --sparse --branch v3.14.2 https://github.com/python/cpython.git C:\cpython
